meta.description: Sample audience registry for the civic/0.4 eligibility model. An audience is an (org_type AND subject) predicate over the Candid PCS facets; a record's `eligibility.eligible_audiences` is an OR-list of these keys (eligible if a user matches ANY one, AND within each). Audience KEYS are producer-local — the interoperable contract is the resolved (org_type, subject) clauses, which a producer ships alongside its records (this file) so any consumer can resolve `eligible_audiences` without external knowledge. `ALL` is a wildcard on a facet.
meta.facet_source: Candid Philanthropy Classification System (PCS) — org_type = OrgType facet, pcs_subject = Subject facet (CC BY 4.0, https://taxonomy.candid.org)
